products.access: CDS account and accepted licence required

variables.name: surface_pressure
variables.role: atmospheric column load and direct attraction

variables.name: total_precipitation
variables.role: terrestrial hydrology forcing and contamination diagnostic

warnings: ERA5T can change when finalized two to three months later; record retrieval date and checksum.
Total precipitation is accumulated and requires explicit interval handling.
Wave height is not an additional mean water-mass load.

products.resolution: hourly sea level; native product grid
products.temporal_extent_observed: 2020-11-01 through rolling forecast horizon (product metadata reviewed 2026-07-12)
products.selected_variable_semantics: Sea surface height computed without tides and surface pressure force (ocean_dynamic_sea_level)
products.role: non-tidal non-inverse-barometer ocean dynamic sea-level anomaly source for surface-mass loading
warnings: Do not substitute total_sea_level: it contains ocean tide, inverse-barometer, dynamic sea level, and global mean steric and mass-volume terms.
Do not add the MOWL invert_barometer variable when the registered ERA5-driven ocean response is enabled.
Freeze exact product/dataset versions, variable metadata, retrieval time, and checksums.

forbidden: treating significant wave height as added water mass
combining pre-corrected SG residuals with the same correction term again
